name: unicode-nfd-divergence
notes: Proposed by seritalien (Vauban Pay). RFC 8785 performs no Unicode normalization. The e-acute character can be encoded two ways: NFC pre-composed (U+00E9, 2 UTF-8 bytes c3 a9) producing digest 24d6bd16..., or NFD decomposed (e + U+0301, 3 UTF-8 bytes 65 cc 81) producing digest 5c775958.... This vector uses NFC. Real-world sources (macOS HFS+, some databases) silently normalize, which would change the digest.
